title: SAN JOSE
prompt_preview:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 3209 creates the first-of-its-kind Retail Crime Restraining Order.",
    "The Retail Crime Restraining Order can be imposed upon conviction or following two or more citations for theft offenses, vandalism within the store, or battery on an employee.",
    "AB 3209 aims to protect local businesses, employees, and shoppers by providing an enforcement tool to combat organized and repeated retail theft.",
    "The creation of the Retail Crime Restraining Order received overwhelming bipartisan support in the California Legislature.",
    "AB 3209 is part of a comprehensive legislative package addressing retail crime and theft.",
    "Retail theft and robbery rates have risen in California.",
    "Petty theft is a prevalent barrier to economic health and recovery for small businesses.",
    "The Bay Area had the highest reported rates of shoplifting in California in 2022, with significant increases in rates.",
    "Shoplifting rates in San Mateo County increased by 53 percent between 2019 and 2022.",
    "San Francisco County saw a 24 percent increase in shoplifting rates between 2019 and 2022.",
    "The California State Assembly established a Select Committee on Retail Theft in 2023 to examine retail theft issues."
  ]
}
```
